name: bluewave
description: Bluewave AI Creative Operations Agent — manage assets, AI captions, approvals, and team via chat.

tools.name: bluewave_list_assets
tools.description: List media assets in Bluewave. Supports filtering by status (draft, pending_approval, approved) and pagination.

status.description: Filter by asset status. Omit to show all.

tools.name: bluewave_get_asset
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific asset including caption, hashtags, status, compliance score, and file metadata.

tools.name: bluewave_upload_asset
tools.description: Upload a media file (image or video) to Bluewave. The AI agent will automatically generate a caption and hashtags using Claude Vision. Use this when the user sends an image or video attachment.

file_url.description: URL of the file to download and upload to Bluewave.

tools.name: bluewave_update_asset
tools.description: Update an asset's caption or hashtags.

tools.name: bluewave_delete_asset
tools.description: Permanently delete an asset. Requires admin role. Always confirm with the user before executing.

asset_id.description: UUID of the asset to delete.

tools.name: bluewave_submit_for_approval
tools.description: Submit a draft asset for approval. Changes status from 'draft' to 'pending_approval'.

tools.name: bluewave_approve_asset
tools.description: Approve a pending asset. Changes status from 'pending_approval' to 'approved'. Requires admin role.

tools.name: bluewave_reject_asset
tools.description: Reject a pending asset with a comment. Changes status from 'pending_approval' back to 'draft'. Requires admin role.

comment.description: Reason for rejection (e.g., 'Image too dark, needs better lighting').

tools.name: bluewave_regenerate_caption
tools.description: Regenerate AI caption for an asset using Claude Vision. The AI will re-analyze the image and produce a new contextual caption.

tools.name: bluewave_regenerate_hashtags
tools.description: Regenerate AI hashtags for an asset using Claude Vision. The AI will produce fresh, relevant hashtags based on the image content.

tools.name: bluewave_check_compliance
tools.description: Run a brand compliance check on an asset. Returns a score (0-100) and specific issues found against the tenant's brand guidelines.

asset_id.description: UUID of the asset to check.

tools.name: bluewave_ai_usage
tools.description: Get AI usage summary for the current tenant. Shows total actions, breakdown by type, and total cost for the specified period.

days.description: Number of days to look back (1-365).

tools.name: bluewave_list_team
tools.description: List all team members in the current tenant with their roles and join dates.

tools.name: bluewave_get_profile
tools.description: Get the current user's profile (name, email, role, tenant).

tools.name: bluewave_invite_user
tools.description: Invite a new team member to the Bluewave workspace. Requires admin role.

email.description: Email address of the new user.

full_name.description: Full name of the new user.

password.description: Temporary password for the new user.

tools.name: bluewave_get_brand_guidelines
tools.description: Get the active brand guidelines for the current tenant, including colors, fonts, tone, dos/don'ts.

tools.name: bluewave_search_assets
tools.description: Full-text search across assets by caption, hashtags, or filename. Use this when the user wants to find specific assets by keyword instead of browsing by status.

query.description: Search query to match against caption, hashtags, and filename.

status.description: Optionally narrow results to a specific status.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: bluewave_bulk_export
tools.description: Export multiple assets as a single ZIP download. Use this when the user wants to download several assets at once for offline use or sharing.

asset_ids.description: Array of asset UUIDs to include in the ZIP export.

tools.name: bluewave_asset_variants
tools.description: List all resize variants (thumbnails, social-media crops, etc.) generated for an asset. Use this when the user needs a specific size or wants to see available formats.

tools.name: bluewave_batch_approve
tools.description: Approve multiple pending assets in a single operation. Use this when the user wants to approve several assets at once instead of one by one. Requires admin role.

asset_ids.description: Array of pending asset UUIDs to approve.

comment.description: Optional approval comment applied to all assets.

tools.name: bluewave_workflow_stats
tools.description: Get workflow performance metrics including average approval time, rejection rate per reviewer, and asset count by status. Use this to understand bottlenecks in the approval pipeline.

days.description: Number of days to look back for metrics.

tools.name: bluewave_auto_approve_by_score
tools.description: Automatically approve all pending assets whose brand compliance score meets or exceeds a minimum threshold. Use this to fast-track high-quality content that already passes brand checks.

min_score.description: Minimum compliance score (0-100) required for auto-approval.

tools.name: bluewave_update_brand_guidelines
tools.description: Update the tenant's brand guidelines (colors, fonts, tone, dos/don'ts, custom rules). Use this when the user wants to modify what the compliance checker enforces. Requires admin role.

colors.description: Brand color palette as hex codes (e.g., ["#FF5733", "#2E86C1"]).

dos.description: List of brand dos — things content should include or follow.

donts.description: List of brand don'ts — things content must avoid.

custom_rules.description: Free-text custom rules for the AI compliance checker to enforce.

tools.name: bluewave_compliance_report
tools.description: Generate an aggregated brand compliance report showing average scores, most common issues, and score trends over time. Use this for periodic brand health reviews.

days.description: Number of days to include in the report.

tools.name: bluewave_check_external_image
tools.description: Check brand compliance of an external image by URL without uploading it as an asset. Use this for quick pre-flight checks before committing to an upload, or to evaluate third-party content.

image_url.description: Public URL of the image to check.

check_types.description: Specific compliance checks to run. Omit to run all checks.

tools.name: bluewave_dashboard_metrics
tools.description: Get main dashboard KPIs: upload volume, average approval speed, workflow efficiency, and estimated cost savings. Use this when the user asks for an overview or summary of platform performance.

days.description: Number of days to calculate metrics over.

compare.description: When true, includes a comparison with the previous period of equal length.

tools.name: bluewave_roi_report
tools.description: Generate a detailed ROI calculation comparing time saved by AI automation against platform costs. Use this when the user wants to justify the platform investment or see cost-benefit analysis.

hourly_rate.description: Team's average hourly rate in USD, used to calculate dollar value of time saved.

tools.name: bluewave_trend_analysis
tools.description: Run AI-powered trend analysis on a chosen metric, revealing content patterns, seasonality, and forward-looking predictions. Use this when the user wants to understand how a metric is evolving over time.

metric.description: The metric to analyze for trends.

days.description: Number of historical days to include in the analysis.

tools.name: bluewave_team_productivity
tools.description: Get per-member productivity metrics including uploads, approvals, average response time, and rejection rate. Use this to evaluate team performance or identify who might need support.

days.description: Number of days to measure productivity over.

tools.name: bluewave_generate_brief
tools.description: Generate a complete creative brief using AI, including objectives, target audience, key messages, and deliverables. Use this when the user needs to kick off a new campaign or content initiative.

prompt.description: Description of the campaign or content need (e.g., 'Summer sale campaign for Gen Z on Instagram').

tools.name: bluewave_caption_variants
tools.description: Generate three caption variants for an asset, each written in a different tone. Use this when the user wants options to choose from or wants to A/B test different messaging styles.

asset_id.description: UUID of the asset to generate caption variants for.

tones.description: Desired tones for the variants (e.g., ["professional", "casual", "storytelling"]). Defaults to three balanced tones if omitted.

tools.name: bluewave_translate_caption
tools.description: Translate an asset's caption into one or more target languages. Use this when the user needs localized versions of content for international audiences.

asset_id.description: UUID of the asset whose caption should be translated.

languages.description: ISO 639-1 language codes to translate into (e.g., ["pt", "es", "fr"]).

tools.name: bluewave_content_calendar
tools.description: View the editorial content calendar for a date range, showing scheduled and published posts. Use this when the user wants to see what is planned or find open slots.

tools.name: bluewave_schedule_post
tools.description: Schedule an approved asset for publication on a specific channel at a given date and time. Use this when the user wants to plan when and where content goes live.

asset_id.description: UUID of the approved asset to schedule.

channel.description: Social media channel to publish on.

caption_override.description: Optional custom caption for this specific post, overriding the asset's default caption.

tools.name: bluewave_remove_user
tools.description: Remove a team member from the workspace. Returns an impact summary (assets owned, pending approvals) before confirming. Requires admin role. Always confirm with the user before executing.

user_id.description: UUID of the team member to remove.

tools.name: bluewave_update_user_role
tools.description: Change a team member's role (admin, editor, or viewer). Use this when the user wants to promote, demote, or adjust permissions for a colleague. Requires admin role.

tools.name: bluewave_billing_summary
tools.description: Get the billing summary for the current tenant including current plan, usage against limits, invoice history, and projected cost for the current cycle. Use this when the user asks about pricing, invoices, or account limits.

tools.name: bluewave_create_api_key
tools.description: Create a new API key for external integrations (webhooks, CI/CD, third-party tools). Use this when the user wants to connect Bluewave to another system programmatically. Requires admin role.

name.description: Human-readable label for the API key (e.g., 'Zapier integration').

permissions.description: Scoped permissions for the key (e.g., ["assets:read", "assets:write"]). Omit for full access.

tools.name: bluewave_audit_log
tools.description: Query the audit log to see who performed which actions and when. Use this for accountability, debugging, or security investigations.

days.description: Number of days to look back.

user_id.description: Filter to actions by a specific user UUID.

tools.name: bluewave_storage_usage
tools.description: Get storage usage breakdown showing total space consumed, usage by file type (image vs video), and month-over-month growth. Use this when the user asks about disk space, storage limits, or file distribution.
